violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw beef stored in the same pan as raw ground hamburger meat. Raw ground hamburger meat needs to be stored separately due to a higher cook temp.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Interior of reach-in prep coolers noted in need of extra cleaning.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Dish machine does not reach a minimum internal temp of 160F. Hot water is supplemented into dish machine but only reaches 140F.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Floors around cooking equipment in need of extra cleaning.
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
